description: Gerbera daisies are safe for cats and come in vibrant, neon-like colors. Unlike many other "daisies" (like Mums or Chamomile) which are toxic, Gerbera daisies are a cheerful, pet-safe choice.
name: Gerbera Daisy
safetyNotes: ⚠️ Note: Many other "daisies" (Chrysanthemums, Chamomile) ARE toxic to cats. Make sure you're getting true Gerbera daisies.
